pm.test('Registration successful and userId saved', function () {

request.description:
Register a new user. No role is assigned at this step. Use the returned `userId` to call **Select Role** next.

Required fields: `name`, `email` (or `phone`), `password`

Assign a role to a newly registered user. Call this immediately after Register using the `{{userId}}` variable.

Available roles: `STUDENT`, `PARENT`, `TEACHER`, `SCHOOL_ADMIN`

exec: pm.test('Token exists and is saved', function () {

request.description:
Login and receive a Bearer token saved to `{{token}}`.

Seed accounts (all use password `password123`):
- `student@school.com` — STUDENT
- `parent@family.com` — PARENT
- `teacher@school.com` — TEACHER
- `admin@school.com` — SCHOOL_ADMIN
Auth: Required. Returns the UUID of a user by email. Saved to `{{id}}`.
Auth: Required. Returns the authenticated user's profile.

Auth: Required (Role: PARENT). Link a student account as a child of the authenticated parent.

Error cases:
- `400` — `childId` missing or target user is not a STUDENT
- `403` — caller is not a PARENT
- `404` — no user found with that childId
- `409` — child already linked to this parent
Auth: Required (Role: PARENT). Returns an array of linked student profiles for the authenticated parent.
Auth: Required (Role: PARENT). Remove the link between the authenticated parent and a student child.
Auth: Required. Returns all schools.
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Create a new school.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER, SCHOOL_ADMIN). Create a new class.
Auth: Required (Role: STUDENT). Join a class by its code.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER, SCHOOL_ADMIN). List all students in a class.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER, SCHOOL_ADMIN). Remove a student from a class.

Auth: Required. Update a student's mastery of a knowledge point.

`mastery` values: `UNMASTERED`, `PARTIAL`, `MASTERED`

Auth: Required. Returns all progress records for a student (flat list) including knowledge point and chapter details, ordered by `updatedAt` desc.

Access: STUDENT (own only), TEACHER / PARENT / SCHOOL_ADMIN (any student).

Auth: Required. Returns a grouped learning report for a student — organised by subject → chapter → knowledge points.

Includes a summary with mastery counts and total study time.

Access: STUDENT (own only), TEACHER / PARENT / SCHOOL_ADMIN (any student).

Progress records are written automatically after every Socratic chat message via background learning behaviour analysis.
Auth: Required. Returns all subjects with nested chapters and knowledge points. Saves the first subject id to `{{subjectId}}`.
Auth: Required. Returns a single subject with nested chapters and knowledge points.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER, SCHOOL_ADMIN). Create a new subject. Saves the returned id to `{{subjectId}}`.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER, SCHOOL_ADMIN). Update a subject's name.
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Delete a subject by ID. Returns 204 No Content.
Auth: Required. Returns all chapters (with knowledge points) for a subject. Saves first chapter id to `{{chapterId}}`.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER, SCHOOL_ADMIN). Create a chapter under a subject. Saves the returned id to `{{chapterId}}`.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER, SCHOOL_ADMIN). Update a chapter's name.
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Delete a chapter by ID. Returns 204 No Content.
Auth: Required. Returns all knowledge points for a chapter. Saves first knowledge point id to `{{knowledgePointId}}`.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER, SCHOOL_ADMIN). Create a knowledge point under a chapter. Saves the returned id to `{{knowledgePointId}}`.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER, SCHOOL_ADMIN). Update a knowledge point's name and/or description.
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Delete a knowledge point by ID. Returns 204 No Content.

exec: pm.test('Session created and chatSessionId saved', function () {

request.description:
Auth: Required. Create a new chat session. Saves the returned id to `{{chatSessionId}}`.

**`type` is required.**
- `Socratic` — guided questioning tutor; title auto-generated from first message; mental health scored per message; learning progress auto-updated after each message.
- `Mental` — empathetic wellbeing companion; mental health scored per message.

**`subject` (optional, strongly recommended for Socratic)** — Subject name (e.g. `"Mathematics"`, `"English Language"`, `"Chinese Language"`). Scopes the learning analysis to knowledge points under that subject only. Without this, the AI analyses against all knowledge points across all subjects, which reduces accuracy.

**`topic` (optional)** — Freeform topic label (e.g. `"Quadratic Equations"`). Stored on the session for reference; does not affect AI routing.

**`systemPrompt` (optional)** — Custom instruction stored on the session and used as the AI system prompt for every message. Overrides the default Socratic or Mental Health prompt. Set it once here; no need to pass it in individual messages.

Both types use the same `/ai/chat` send-message endpoint — the server routes internally based on session type.
Auth: Required. Returns all chat sessions for the authenticated student, ordered by last accessed.
Auth: Required. Returns full conversation history for the session.

Auth: Required. Send a message in a session. Behaviour is determined automatically by `sessionType`:

- **Socratic** — AI replies with a guiding question; title set from first message. Learning behaviour analysis runs in the background: engaged knowledge points and mastery level (`UNMASTERED / PARTIAL / MASTERED`) are identified and `Progress` records are upserted automatically. **Mastery only moves forward** — once a knowledge point reaches `MASTERED`, subsequent messages cannot downgrade it.
- **Mental** — AI replies as an empathetic wellbeing companion. No learning analysis.
- **Both** — AFINN sentiment is scored and returned in `mentalHealth`.

The custom system prompt set when the session was created is applied automatically — no need to pass it here.

**`mentalHealth.signals`** in the response contains generalised category labels (not raw phrases), e.g. `["sleep_disturbance", "academic_pressure"]`. Every message creates a record retrievable via `GET /ai/mental-health/history` for charting.

**Tip:** Pass `subject` when creating the session (`POST /ai/sessions`) so the background analysis is scoped to the correct curriculum knowledge points.
Auth: Required. Deletes the session and all its messages.

Auth: Required. Run AFINN sentiment analysis across **all student messages** in the session and store one summary record. Useful for a post-session wellbeing report.

No request body — pass the session id in the URL.

Response includes: `sentimentScore` (-1 to 1), `scoreDelta`, `currentScore`, `statusLabel`, `emotionPolarity`, `riskLevel`, `signals`, `reasonSummary`, `recordId`

**`signals`** — generalised category labels (not raw phrases). Possible values: `sleep_disturbance`, `concentration_difficulty`, `appetite_change`, `emotional_distress`, `overwhelm`, `low_motivation`, `fatigue`, `anxiety`, `self_worth_issues`, `social_isolation`, `academic_pressure`, `crisis_risk`, `positive_wellbeing`.

query.description: Optional. Filter to a specific session.
Optional. Max records to return (capped at 500). Default 100.

request.description:
Auth: Required. Returns the authenticated student's mental health score history in chronological order — one record per chat message. Designed for frontend charting.

**Query params (all optional)**
- `sessionId` — filter to a single session
- `limit` — max records (default 100, capped at 500)

**Response**
```json
{
  "history": [
    {
      "id": "...",
      "scoreDelta": -3,
      "statusScore": -12,
      "statusLabel": "BAD",
      "riskLevel": "HIGH",
      "emotionPolarity": "NEGATIVE",
      "signals": ["sleep_disturbance", "academic_pressure"],
      "createdAt": "2026-05-29T10:00:00.000Z",
      "sourceSessionId": "..."
    }
  ]
}
```

**Chart usage**
- Plot `statusScore` as a line (cumulative running score, -100 to 100)
- Plot `scoreDelta` as bars (per-message change, -10 to 10)
- Use `statusLabel` (`GOOD` / `NEUTRAL` / `BAD`) to colour data points

**`signals`** — generalised category labels. Possible values: `sleep_disturbance`, `concentration_difficulty`, `appetite_change`, `emotional_distress`, `overwhelm`, `low_motivation`, `fatigue`, `anxiety`, `self_worth_issues`, `social_isolation`, `academic_pressure`, `crisis_risk`, `positive_wellbeing`.
Auth: Required (Role: TEACHER). Returns the teacher's classes, student lists, and progress overview.
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Returns school-wide statistics and class summaries.
Auth: Required (Role: STUDENT, PARENT). Returns the current subscription plan.

Auth: Required. Update the subscription plan.

`plan` values: `FREE`, `PREMIUM`
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Returns all system configuration entries (e.g. active AI model, mental health prompt).
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Create or update a system configuration key-value pair.
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Returns all forbidden keywords used by the chat message filter.
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Add a new word to the forbidden keyword list.
Auth: Required (Role: SCHOOL_ADMIN). Remove a forbidden keyword by its UUID.
